# To add your env:

Note: 
1. Add your environment-specific data (e.g., documents in web search database, csv files in travel plan...) and speific tool/utils codes in your env folder (in ```web_search_env/```, ```travel_planner_env/```, ```web_shopping_env/```, and ```formal_reasoning_env/```). Remember to change path in your env codes respondingly. 
2. update the readme to deploy and run your environment. use file name ```setup_{env_name}.md```

For shopping specifically, the runtime code now lives entirely under `env/env_systems/web_shopping_env/`. Deployment details are in [setup_shopping.md](/home/yuanzhe/AgentGym/agentenv-webshop/Travel_Branch/MemoryArena/env/setup_shopping.md).
